sources.name: ACLED — Armed Conflict Location & Event Data

violation_types: Arbitrary arrest or detention of a Palestinian
Arson or damage to Palestinian cars or other property
Arson or damage to Palestinian farmland, crops, or irrigation systems
Arson or damage to Palestinian homes
Assault on a Palestinian using sticks or other blunt objects
Attack on or theft of Palestinian livestock
Construction or expansion of an Israeli outpost
Raid on a Palestinian village by Israeli security forces
Verbal or armed threat on Palestinians by Israeli security forces
